description: Structured metadata extracted from an email body.

from_name.description: Sender's full name. Empty string if unknown.

from_email.description: Sender's email address. Empty string if not present in the text.

subject.description: Subject line, or a one-sentence synopsis if no subject is present.

intent.description: What the sender wants from the recipient.

action_required.description: True if the email requires a reply or follow-up action.

summary.description: One-sentence summary of the email's content.
